message: I was charged twice for my annual subscription and need a refund as soon as possible.
The mobile app keeps crashing whenever I try to upload a document.
I cannot log in because the password reset link says it has expired.
It would be great if your platform supported dark mode and saved report templates.
I am unhappy with the delay in response from your team and want this escalated.
Can you explain how to export my invoices from the dashboard?
